en_title: Spider-Man Producer Hopes Tom Holland Sticks Around in His Role 'Forever' — Even Though He's Already Discussed Handing Over the Marvel Character to a Younger Star
cn_title: 蜘蛛侠制片人希望荷兰弟永远留任
subtitle: 接班人已有讨论

paragraphs.en: Veteran Spider-Man producer Amy Pascal has said she hopes Tom Holland will play the role "forever" — despite the actor having already discussed handing over the part to a younger star.
paragraphs.cn: 资深《蜘蛛侠》制片人Amy Pascal表示，她希望Tom Holland「永远」饰演这个角色——尽管Holland已谈过把这一角色交给更年轻的演员。

paragraphs.en: Holland is of course set to appear in this month's Spider-Man: Brand New Day , and has privately suggested he will return for at least one more sequel . Publicly, however, Holland has been vocal about wanting to eventually hand over the Spider-Man mantle, and even suggested actors to take on the role in future.
paragraphs.cn: Holland当然会出演本月上映的《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》，私下也曾暗示至少还会回归一部续集。不过在公开场合，他一直直言希望最终交出蜘蛛侠的衣钵，甚至还推荐过未来可以接演的人选。

paragraphs.en: Sony seems keen to keep Holland around — possibly with an eye on the fact that Brand New Day looks set to become enormously successful, with the movie's trailer setting a new watch record that not even Avengers: Doomsday could beat .
paragraphs.cn: 索尼看来很想留住Holland——或许也考虑到《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》很可能取得巨大成功，其预告片创下了连《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》也未能打破的新观看纪录。

paragraphs.en: Asked about the possibility of Holland hanging up his Spidey mask at some point in the future, and whether Brand New Day was intended as part of a trilogy or its own standalone thing, Pascal made it clear she'd like to see the actor continue for a long while yet.
paragraphs.cn: 有人问Pascal，Holland未来是否可能摘下蜘蛛侠面罩，以及《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》究竟计划成为三部曲的一部分还是独立作品。她明确表示，希望Holland继续出演很长时间。

paragraphs.en: "I think each movie has to be its own thing, no matter what," Pascal told Collider . "From the very beginning, Kevin [Feige, Marvel Studios boss] and I have been working together on these movies, we realized this morning, for 27 years, and every time we set out to tell another saga in Peter Parker's life, it has to be able to stand on its own completely. Having said that, we hope Tom's going to be our Spider-Man forever."
paragraphs.cn: Pascal告诉Collider：「无论如何，我认为每部电影都必须自成一体。从一开始，Kevin（漫威影业负责人Kevin Feige）和我就在合作制作这些电影。我们今天早上才意识到，双方已经合作27年了。每当我们着手讲述Peter Parker人生中的另一段传奇时，作品都必须能够完全独立成立。话虽如此，我们希望Tom永远是我们的蜘蛛侠。」

paragraphs.en: Holland first appeared as Spider-Man when he was aged just 19, back in 2026's Captain America: Civil War, and has grown up as a regular fixture of the MCU. Now aged 30, nothing has officially been announced about his ongoing involvement beyond Brand New Day, though Sony has suggested this could be the start of a new era for Holland's character, and there's a broad expectation among fans that he'll pop up in 2027's Avengers: Secret Wars.
paragraphs.cn: Holland在19岁时首次饰演蜘蛛侠，亮相于2026年的《美国队长：内战》，随后伴随这个漫威电影宇宙常驻角色一同成长。如今他已30岁，官方尚未公布他在《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》之后是否继续参与；不过索尼暗示，这可能是Holland版角色新时代的开端，粉丝也普遍预计他会出现在2027年的《复仇者联盟：秘密战争》中。

paragraphs.en: But how many more Spider-Man movies will Holland appear in after that? Infamously, the actor stated back in 2021 that if he was "playing Spider-Man after I’m 30, I’ve done something wrong." Reminded of that quote this year, Holland told GQ that he now needed to "maybe... change the quote to 37," and suggested his remark had been influenced by him "trying to leverage Sony and scare them into thinking I wasn’t going to do Spider-Man 4."
paragraphs.cn: 那么在此之后，Holland还会出演多少部《蜘蛛侠》电影？他曾在2021年说过一句著名的话：「如果我30岁以后还在演蜘蛛侠，那就说明我做错了什么。」今年被问及此言时，Holland告诉《GQ》，自己现在或许需要「把这句话改成37岁」，并称当时的说法受到这样一种考虑影响：他想「借此向索尼施压，让他们担心我不会出演《蜘蛛侠4》」。

paragraphs.en: Still, back in May, Holland said he wanted to help set up a new era for the Spider-Man franchise , shepherding in a fresh Spider-Man or Spider-Woman as his replacement. "For whoever's next, whether that is a Miles Morales or a Spider-Gwen or a Spider-Woman or something like that, I would love to be a part of setting up the next chapter," Holland said.
paragraphs.cn: 不过今年5月，Holland表示，他希望帮助《蜘蛛侠》系列开启新时代，引入一名全新的蜘蛛侠或蜘蛛女接替自己。他说：「无论下一位是谁，是Miles Morales、Spider-Gwen、Spider-Woman，还是其他角色，我都很愿意参与铺垫下一篇章。」

paragraphs.en: Then, last month, Holland again discussed passing the Spider-Man torch to another, younger actor, this time suggesting the star of Netflix drama Adolescence for the iconic role . "Owen Cooper would be awesome," Holland said of the 16-year-old British actor who played teenage murder suspect Jamie Miller. "Obviously he’s super-talented and the talk of the town right now."
paragraphs.cn: 上个月，Holland再次谈及把蜘蛛侠的火炬交给另一位年轻演员，这次他推荐了Netflix剧集《混沌少年时》的主演。谈到这位饰演少年谋杀嫌疑人Jamie Miller的16岁英国演员时，Holland说：「Owen Cooper会很棒。他显然极有天赋，现在也正是大家热议的人物。」

paragraphs.en: Has Holland been trying to leverage Sony again ahead of a deal for Spider-Man 5? However long he stays in the role, it sounds like Sony is keen he sticks around for now. In the meantime, there's Spider-Man: Brand New Day to look forward to, which lands in theaters on July 31. Yesterday brought the movie's final trailer, which you should go watch now for a handy recap on Peter Parker's journey so far .
paragraphs.cn: Holland是否又在《蜘蛛侠5》签约前向索尼施压？无论他还会出演多久，索尼目前显然希望他留下。眼下，观众可以先期待7月31日登陆影院的《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》。影片最终预告片已于昨天发布，也方便观众回顾Peter Parker迄今为止的旅程。

summary: 资深制片人Amy Pascal希望Tom Holland永远饰演蜘蛛侠，但Holland已多次谈及把角色交给年轻演员，并点名16岁的Owen Cooper是合适人选。
opus_summary: 制片人Amy Pascal希望Tom Holland长期饰演蜘蛛侠，索尼也有意留住他。不过Holland已多次谈到未来交棒，还表示愿意协助Miles Morales、Spider-Gwen等新一代角色登场。
